allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: redesign website with Odoo-inspired modern SaaS style

- Add gradient backgrounds with decorative blur blobs
- Add floating images/screenshots on gradient sections
- Update Navbar with dropdown menu and clean styling
- Redesign Home page with app grid showcase and stats
- Update ERP, Messaging, E-commerce pages with hero images
- Add animated sections with Framer Motion
- Update Footer with dark theme and multi-column layout
- Improve typography with large bold headlines
- Add hover effects and transitions throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: update Home and Navbar to match Odoo clean design style

- Replace gradient backgrounds with clean white backgrounds
- Add browser mockup frames for screenshots
- Add hand-drawn SVG doodle arrows with dashed strokes
- Update CTAs to teal color \(#00A09D\)
- Use purple brand accent \(#714b67\) for logo
- Simplify navigation with cleaner styling
- Add letter-based colored icon boxes for apps grid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
